response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role specifically requires a senior C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity. The resume shows only a brief 7-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, with the bulk of recent work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no evidence of industrial automation, secure development lifecycle work, or the required protocol experience (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.).
strengths: 12+ years of software development experience across diverse stacks
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems (Dunnhumby)
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience — only a brief 2014-2015 stint at National Instruments
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA) or automation manufacturing domain

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IEC 62443 background
